classObjective: Write an explicit equation for the nth term of an arithmetic sequence and model real-world situations with arithmetic sequences.
workedExamples: 4-5, Example 3 — Write an Equation and Find the 7th Term of an Arithmetic Sequence
4-5, Example 4 — Model Real-World Situations with Arithmetic Sequences (Cooler, Theater, Postage)
warmUp: Write the explicit formula for the sequence: 3, 7, 11, 15, ...
conceptDevelopment: Mini-lesson: explicit formula a_n = a_1 + (n-1)d; cooler, theater ticket, postage contexts; real-world modeling
guidedPractice: Teacher-led practice writing explicit formulas for arithmetic sequences and modeling real-world situations
independentPractice: Practice problems writing arithmetic sequence formulas and applying to real-world contexts
assessment: Exit ticket: write the explicit formula for the number of seats in a theater with 20 rows, 30 seats in the first row, and 2 additional seats per row
capReflection: How does the explicit formula for arithmetic sequences connect to the slope-intercept form of a linear equation?
